sizing_rule.note: Apply Kelly Criterion to calculate optimal fraction (f) of current stake. Do not bet 100% on any single trade. Position size = f × current_stake, where f maximizes the growth function G(f). Specific f value must be derived from win rate and payoff ratio.

source_rule_text: Do not bet 100% of your stake on any single wager, as this guarantees ruin upon the first losing trade; instead, apply the Kelly Criterion to determine an optimal fixed fraction (f) of your stake that maximizes the growth function G(f).
